title: DDS Net Accuracy Rate by State, FY2007–FY2022
description: SSA federal quality-assurance net accuracy rate for state Disability Determination Services (DDS), by state and fiscal year, 2007–2022, with sampling variability and a NATIONAL row each year. Net accuracy = share of sampled initial determinations with no documented deficiency affecting the decision.

columns.name: STATE
columns.description: State/territory name in uppercase (includes DIST OF COLUMBIA, PUERTO RICO, and a NATIONAL roll-up row per year).

columns.name: NET ACCURACY RATE
columns.description: Net accuracy rate as a percent string, e.g. '96.70%'.

columns.name: SAMPLING VARIABILITY (SV) PERCENT
columns.description: Sampling variability. Usually a decimal percent (e.g. 1.43); occasionally a confidence-bound text like 'UL* 99.8 - LL** 98.1' or blank when not published.

columns.name: COMMENTS
columns.description: Optional note, e.g. 'SV manually computed'. Usually empty.

geographic_coverage: All U.S. states + DC + Puerto Rico, with NATIONAL roll-up
notes: NET ACCURACY RATE is a percent string ('96.70%') — strip '%' to compute. SV is mixed-type: parse a leading float where present, otherwise treat as text. A -LATEST alias (dds-net-accuracy-by-state-2007-LATEST.csv) mirrors the newest published vintage.
